message:
feat(simulation): Cx-first setup + sandbox trigger/check (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Follow-on to tick 65. Adds Cx-first variants for the three
remaining narrow async entry points on `Scenario` and
`TutorialSandbox`.

Additions (strictly additive, asupersync-runtime-gated):

  * `Scenario::setup_with_cx(cx, mock)` — Cx-first parallel of
    `setup`. Pre-flight checkpoint gates the pane-add loop;
    per-iteration checkpoint before each `mock.add_pane` call
    with the pane index embedded in the cancellation error.
    Panes added before a mid-run cancellation remain on the
    mock (no rollback — MockWezterm has no transactional
    bulk-add).

  * `TutorialSandbox::trigger_exercise_events_with_cx(cx)` —
    Cx-first parallel of `trigger_exercise_events`. Thin wrapper
    that routes through `Scenario::execute_all_with_cx` (tick 65)
    when a scenario is loaded. No additional checkpoint at the
    sandbox boundary because the inner path already gates.

  * `TutorialSandbox::check_all_expectations_with_cx(cx)` —
    Cx-first parallel of `check_all_expectations`. Pre-flight
    checkpoint + per-iteration checkpoint (via `is_err()` so
    cancellation surfaces as a partial (pass, fail, skip) tuple
    rather than a panic; the signature is `(usize, usize, usize)`
    with no Err channel). A pre-cancelled cx short-circuits to
    `(0, 0, 0)`. A mid-run cancel returns the partial counts
    accumulated up to the abort point — matches the expected
    operator UX where aborted test runs still show partial
    progress.

Regression tests (2 new):

  * `scenario_setup_with_cx_matches_legacy` — loads a 2-pane
    scenario, runs `setup` on one MockWezterm and `setup_with_cx`
    on another, asserts pane_count parity AND per-pane text
    parity (initial_content preserved through both paths).

  * `sandbox_cx_first_trail_matches_legacy` — uses the default
    tutorial sandbox (2 panes + 2 events + 2 contains
    expectations) as the fixture. Runs the ambient path
    (`trigger_exercise_events` + `check_all_expectations`) on one
    sandbox and the Cx-first variants on another. Asserts
    trigger count parity AND (pass, fail, skip) tuple parity.

Verification (local fork bypass):
  * simulation:: — 185 passed / 0 failed (tick 65: 183 -> tick 66:
    185, +2 new parity tests)
  * cargo build -p frankenterm-core --lib — clean (50.26s)
  * cargo fmt -p frankenterm-core -- --check — clean

Cx-first simulation.rs progress after tick 66:
  * `Scenario::execute_until`       ✓ (tick 65)
  * `Scenario::execute_all`         ✓ (tick 65)
  * `Scenario::setup`               ✓ (tick 66, this commit)
  * `TutorialSandbox::trigger_exercise_events` ✓ (tick 66)
  * `TutorialSandbox::check_all_expectations`  ✓ (tick 66)
  * `Scenario::execute_until_with_resize_timeline` — pending
    (complex timeline-probe variant, larger slice)
  * `Scenario::execute_all_with_resize_timeline` — pending
    (same rationale)

Bead: ft-xbnl0.2.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
